manifest.name: Vuln Report Kit

name: Vuln Report Kit

releases.author: aleff-github
releases.description:
# Vuln Report Kit v1.0.0 Release Notes

Vuln Report Kit v1.0.0 is the first stable local-first release.

## Positioning

A local Obsidian toolkit for writing clean, structured, and sanitized vulnerability research reports.

## Included workflow

- create vulnerability cases
- generate Markdown report structures
- track case status and timeline
- open a local dashboard
- install starter templates
- import local template packs
- create notes from templates
- scan for possible secrets
- create sanitized public reports
- export case bundles
- create shareable case archives
- export all cases index
- backup templates
- run local health checks
- create demo cases for screenshots/videos

## Privacy and infrastructure

This release does not use:

- servers
- accounts
- login
- telemetry
- remote APIs
- cloud storage
- external AI
- license validation

All content stays in the user's Obsidian vault.

## Security reminder

The scanner and sanitizer are regex-based helpers. A manual review is still required before sharing or publishing any report.
releases.name: Stable 1.0.0
